parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.job_import_runs (
  import_source,
  import_file_path,
  import_file_name,
  import_format,
  records_seen,
  records_valid,
  records_rejected,
  duplicate_candidates,
  status,
  raw_summary
) VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, 'running', $9::jsonb
)
RETURNING id AS import_run_id, import_source, import_file_name, status;

WITH src AS (
  SELECT * FROM jsonb_to_recordset($2::jsonb) AS x(
    job_title text,
    company text,
    work_model text,
    normalized_location text,
    salary_range text,
    source text,
    job_url text,
    application_status text,
    match_score integer,
    priority text,
    reasons jsonb,
    risks jsonb,
    recommended_action text,
    next_step text,
    tailored_angle text,
    required_skills jsonb,
    preferred_skills jsonb,
    language_requirements jsonb,
    notes text,
    raw_job jsonb
  )
), upserted AS (
  INSERT INTO public.job_applications (
    job_title, company, work_model, normalized_location, salary_range, source, job_url,
    application_status, match_score, priority, reasons, risks, recommended_action,
    next_step, tailored_angle, required_skills, preferred_skills, language_requirements,
    notes, raw_job
  )
  SELECT job_title, company, work_model, normalized_location, salary_range, source, job_url,
    application_status, match_score, priority, reasons, risks, recommended_action,
    next_step, tailored_angle, required_skills, preferred_skills, language_requirements,
    notes, raw_job
  FROM src
  ON CONFLICT (lower(company), lower(job_title), coalesce(job_url, '')) DO UPDATE SET
    work_model = EXCLUDED.work_model,
    normalized_location = EXCLUDED.normalized_location,
    salary_range = EXCLUDED.salary_range,
    source = EXCLUDED.source,
    application_status = EXCLUDED.application_status,
    match_score = EXCLUDED.match_score,
    priority = EXCLUDED.priority,
    reasons = EXCLUDED.reasons,
    risks = EXCLUDED.risks,
    recommended_action = EXCLUDED.recommended_action,
    next_step = EXCLUDED.next_step,
    tailored_angle = EXCLUDED.tailored_angle,
    required_skills = EXCLUDED.required_skills,
    preferred_skills = EXCLUDED.preferred_skills,
    language_requirements = EXCLUDED.language_requirements,
    notes = EXCLUDED.notes,
    raw_job = EXCLUDED.raw_job,
    updated_at = now()
  RETURNING (xmax = 0) AS inserted
)
SELECT $1::bigint AS import_run_id,
       count(*)::integer AS upserted_rows,
       count(*) FILTER (WHERE inserted)::integer AS inserted_rows,
       count(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT inserted)::integer AS updated_rows
FROM upserted;

UPDATE public.job_import_runs
SET records_seen = $2,
    records_valid = $3,
    records_rejected = $4,
    records_inserted = $5,
    records_updated = $6,
    duplicate_candidates = $7,
    status = 'completed',
    finished_at = now(),
    raw_summary = $8::jsonb
WHERE id = $1::bigint
RETURNING *;

options.queryReplacement: ={{[$('Create Import Run').first().json.import_run_id,$('Split Valid and Rejected Records').first().json.recordsSeen,$('Split Valid and Rejected Records').first().json.recordsValid,$('Split Valid and Rejected Records').first().json.recordsRejected,$('Upsert Valid Rows').first().json.inserted_rows,$('Upsert Valid Rows').first().json.updated_rows,$('Split Valid and Rejected Records').first().json.duplicateCandidates,JSON.stringify($('Split Valid and Rejected Records').first().json)]}}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { status: 'completed', message: 'Import audit workflow finished. Verify database rows with ./scripts/report-job-tracker.sh and ./scripts/query-job-tracker.sh', importRun: $json } }];
